summary: C-233 World Generation Wizard is 95% implemented. 19 files exist with full implementation: shared types (WorldGenInput/Output, 12 Surprise Me presets, getRandomPreset), TypeBox schemas, system prompt, ViewModel with 6-step state machine (genre_tone/setting_difficulty/goals/generating/preview/character_creation), DaisyUI wizard view with step indicator, seeding service (NPCs/locations/arcs/HUD widgets → GameStateService), sandbox ViewModel with mock LLM responses, updated /setup route with ?skip-wizard support, and all test layers (64 unit tests, 7 E2E, 4 visual). One file remains: the dev sandbox route at routes/(dev)/dev/world-gen/+page.svelte (empty directory, needs a page mounting the existing sandbox VM with debug controls). WARNING: The contract specifies Zod but codebase uses TypeBox — do NOT change schema library. The contract's WorldGenInput uses plural genres/tone arrays but implementation uses single strings — this is an accepted simplification.
